Tree data structure.
AbstractIterNc
Iterate over tree starting at `node`.
        Base class for all iterators.
        :param filter_:  function called with every `node` as argument,
                         `node` is returned if `True`.
        :param stop:     stop iteration at `node` if `stop` function
                         returns `True` for `node`.
        :parma maxlevel: maximum descending in the node hierarchy.
        N)
node

stop
maxlevel

staticmethodr
PreOrderIterz
Iterate over tree applying pre-order strategy starting at `node`.
    Start at root and go-down until reaching a leaf node.
    Step upwards then, and search for the next leafs.
    c
child_Z
descendantmaxlevelZ

	NodeMixin
        Parent Node.
        On set, the node is detached from any previous parent node and attached
        to the new node.
        N)

NodeNc
        A simple tree node with a `name` and any `kwargs`.
        :param name:     A name or any other object this node can reference
                         to as idendifier.
        :param parent:   Reference to parent node.
        :param children: Iterable with child nodes.
        :param kwargs:   Any other given attribute is just stored
                         as object attribute.
        N)
